title: Simple Timber
description: Simple plugin that will allow you to chop whole tree at once!
body:
# Simple Timber
Simple plugin that will allow you to chop whole tree at once!
## Plugin commands:
- /simpletimber reload - Reload plugin
## You can config:
- Whether the plugin is enabled
- List of log types that can be timbered
- Whether falling block animation is enabled

## Additional informations:

- **All log blocks that are above or next to log block you break will be destroyed!**
- **To chop single block of log you must hold your sneak button (by default it's Left Shift)**
